postReview.title: Brighton 2-1 Nottingham Forest: Gomez and Welbeck sink struggling visitors
postReview.description: Brighton made it back-to-back Premier League victories as Nottingham Forest were put to the sword at the Amex Stadium on Sunday.

postReview.title: Brighton 2-1 Nottingham Forest: Gómez y Welbeck hunden a unos visitantes en apuros
postReview.description: El Brighton encadenó dos victorias seguidas en la Premier League al imponerse al Nottingham Forest el domingo en el Amex Stadium.

postReview.title: Brighton 2-1 Nottingham Forest: Gomez e Welbeck afundam visitantes em má fase
postReview.description: Brighton emplacou a segunda vitória seguida na Premier League, e o Nottingham Forest foi derrotado no Amex Stadium neste domingo.

postReview.title: Brighton-Nottingham Forest 2-1: Gomez e Welbeck affondano gli ospiti in crisi
postReview.description: Il Brighton ha centrato la seconda vittoria consecutiva in Premier League: Nottingham Forest messo al tappeto domenica all’Amex Stadium.

postReview.title: Brighton 2-1 Nottingham Forest : Gomez et Welbeck enfoncent des visiteurs en difficulté
postReview.description: Brighton a enchaîné une deuxième victoire de suite en Premier League en mettant Nottingham Forest au supplice dimanche à l’Amex Stadium.

postReview.title: Brighton 2:1 Nottingham Forest: Gomez und Welbeck versenken die taumelnden Gäste
postReview.description: Brighton feierte am Sonntag im Amex Stadium den zweiten Premier-League-Sieg in Serie und fertigte Nottingham Forest klar ab.

postReview.title: برايتون 2-1 نوتنغهام فورست: غوميز وويلبيك يُسقطان الضيوف المتعثرين
postReview.description: حقق برايتون فوزه الثاني توالياً في الدوري الإنجليزي الممتاز بعدما تغلّب على نوتنغهام فورست 2-1 على ملعب أميكس، الأحد.

postReview.title: Brighton 2-1 Nottingham Forest: Gomez e Welbeck afundam visitantes em dificuldades
postReview.description: Brighton soma a segunda vitória consecutiva na Premier League ao bater o Nottingham Forest no Amex Stadium

preReview.title: Dunk wants to see Brighton fight, but not targeting European places
preReview.description: Brighton are looking to make it back-to-back victories, welcoming struggling Nottingham Forest to the Amex Stadium on Sunday.

preReview.title: Dunk quiere ver al Brighton competir, pero no se marca como objetivo Europa
preReview.description: El Brighton busca enlazar dos victorias y recibe el domingo en el Amex Stadium a un Nottingham Forest en apuros.

preReview.title: Dunk vuole vedere un Brighton combattivo, ma non punta all'Europa
preReview.description: Il Brighton cerca la seconda vittoria di fila: domenica all'Amex Stadium arriva un Nottingham Forest in difficoltà.

preReview.title: Dunk quer ver o Brighton com mais briga, mas sem mirar vaga europeia
preReview.description: O Brighton tenta engatar a segunda vitória seguida ao receber o pressionado Nottingham Forest no Amex Stadium, no domingo.

preReview.title: Dunk veut voir Brighton se battre, mais ne vise pas l'Europe
preReview.description: Brighton vise une deuxième victoire de rang en recevant le fragile Nottingham Forest à l'Amex Stadium dimanche.

preReview.title: Dunk will bei Brighton mehr Biss sehen, Europa aber nicht als Ziel ausgeben
preReview.description: Brighton peilt den zweiten Sieg in Folge an und empfängt das kriselnde Nottingham Forest am Sonntag im Amex Stadium.

preReview.title: دانك يريد رؤية برايتون يقاتل، لكنه لا يستهدف المراكز الأوروبية
preReview.description: يتطلع برايتون لتحقيق انتصارين متتاليين، عندما يستضيف نوتنغهام فورست المتعثر على ملعب أميكس يوم الأحد.

preReview.title: Dunk quer ver o Brighton a lutar, mas sem apontar aos lugares europeus
preReview.description: O Brighton procura somar a segunda vitória consecutiva e recebe o aflito Nottingham Forest no Amex Stadium, no domingo.

QAData.question: Who won between Brighton & Hove Albion and Nottingham Forest on Sun, 01 Mar 2026 14:00:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Brighton & Hove Albion won 2–1 over Nottingham Forest on Sun, 01 Mar 2026 14:00:00 GMT.
